exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your empty nest forward
items: Schedule a dedicated conversation with your partner about your feelings and concerns regarding this new phase of life
Create a daily self-care routine that includes one activity you enjoyed before having children
Join a local empty nest support group or online community for parents experiencing this transition
Write a letter to your child expressing your pride in their independence and your excitement for their future
Establish a new weekly ritual or tradition that celebrates your newfound freedom and personal time
Create a memory box or scrapbook of your favorite parenting moments to honor this chapter while embracing the next
